zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Knight Richard Basset於1265年出生在英國英格蘭諾薩普頓史爾格亞特 威爾頓時，他的父親Ralf Basset Lord of Great Weldon34歲，母親Alianore Wade20歲。他於1299年與Joan Huntingfield結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1314年8月18日之前，埋葬在英國英格蘭諾薩普頓史爾格亞特 威爾頓。

nameMeanings.name: Basset
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: French: from a diminutive of Old French bas(se) ‘short, of low stature’ (see Bas ).
English: variant of   Bassett  , a cognate of 1 above.
In some cases also an altered form of French Besset (see Bessette 2). Compare Bassette 1.

variants.name: Bas
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Mauricio, Abelardo, Florencio, Francisco, Jorge, Luis, Manuel, Pedro, Soledad, Vicente.  Eastern Slavic Dmytro, Liya, Pyotr, Sergey.
Catalan: habitational name from a place so named in the district of La Garrotxa, Catalonia.
Basque: topographic name for someone who lived by a wood, from baso ‘wood, forest’.

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Knight Richard Basset was born in 1265, in Great Weldon, Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Ralf Basset Lord of Great Weldon, was 34 and his mother, Alianore Wade, was 20. He married Joan Huntingfield in 1299. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. He died before 18 August 1314, and was buried in Great Weldon, Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Knight Richard Basset est né en 1265, à Great Weldon, Northamptonshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Ralf Basset Lord of Great Weldon, avait 34 ans et sa mère, Alianore Wade, avait 20 ans. Il a épousé Joan Huntingfield en 1299. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé avant 18 août 1314, et a été enterré à Great Weldon, Northamptonshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Knight Richard Bassetが1265年にイギリスイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアグレアト ウエルドンで生まれた時，父Ralf Basset Lord of Great Weldonは34歳，母Alianore Wadeは20歳であった。1299年にJoan Huntingfieldと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1314年8月18日以前に死去し，イギリスイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアグレアト ウエルドンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Knight Richard Basset(이)가 1265년 영국 잉글랜드 노르섬프토실르 그리트 웰던에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Ralf Basset Lord of Great Weldon(은)는 34세였고, 그의 어머니 Alianore Wade(은)는 20세였다. 그는 1299년 Joan Huntingfield(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1314년 8월 18일 이전 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 노르섬프토실르 그리트 웰던에 묻혔다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Knight Richard Basset родился в 1265 г. в местности грит велдон, нортамптоншир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Ralf Basset Lord of Great Weldon было 34 года, а матери, которую звали Alianore Wade, 20. Он женился на женщине по имени Joan Huntingfield в 1299 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер перед 18 августа 1314 г. и был похоронен в местности грит велдон, нортамптоншир, Англия, Великобритания.
